command.target.player.only: The target of this command should be the a player
command.target.entity.only: The target of this command should be the an entity
commands.toggle.theme: Successfully switched the theme style of the dialog box
commands.set.max.trigger.count: Successfully set maximum trigger count of %s to %s
commands.reset.max.trigger.count: Successfully reset maximum trigger count for all dialogues
chatbox.configuration.historical_scroll_: The speed of the historical record interface scroll wheel
text.autoconfig.chatbox_config.title: ChatBox Mod Config Screen
text.autoconfig.chatbox_config.option.hi: The speed of the historical record interface scroll wheel
text.autoconfig.chatbox_config.option.so: Whether to interrupt currently playing sound when no new sound is available
text.autoconfig.chatbox_config.option.is: Whether to block TerraNpc's dialogue system
chatbox.test.text.1:
Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆ @s, welcome to the ChatBox mod!
This dialog system is designed for map and modpack creators, aiming to provide players with an immersive, <ruby 12 galgame>visual-novel-like conversation experience in Minecraft.
chatbox.test.text.2: This mod uses datapacks to store dialog content, offering high configuration freedom. Every element you see in this interface can be modified via datapacks.
chatbox.test.text.3:
The dialog box has two modes.
1. Screen Mode: Players can interact with the dialog using the mouse, but cannot perform other in-game actions.
2. Render Layer Mode: <ruby 48 though many dialog interactions are unavailable>Players can perform most normal gameplay actions, making it more suitable for adventure scenarios.
chatbox.test.text.4:
Each dialog line can trigger sound effects and execute commands.
Dialog text supports translation keys, formatting, and placeholders.
Examples: §1Col§2or§3ed §4Text, §f§lBold, §oItalic§r. @@s refers to the current player's name: @s.
chatbox.test.text.5: Options support locking, hiding, dialog jumping, hover tooltips, and can also execute commands.
chatbox.test.text.6:
Illustrations come in three types, supporting render attachments, animations, and component render events.
What are component render events? Try clicking the illustration in the bottom-left corner!
chatbox.test.text.7: As a dialog mod, it also includes auto-play, Ctrl to fast-forward, history log, and right-click to hide the dialog box.
chatbox.test.text.8: In Screen Mode, press F3 to enter debug mode. You can use this to visually adjust component properties.
chatbox.test.text.10:
For detailed introduction, tutorials, and a dialog JSON generator, please visit the official wiki:
https://doc.mafuyu.moe/wiki/ChatBox
chatbox.test.option.6: Click Me to Show Hidden Options
chatbox.test.tooltip.1: Unlocked when you have a netherite sword in your first slot
chatbox.debug.tip1: Debug mode enabled. Hold Shift to display component borders and cursor position
chatbox.debug.tip3: ①Displays information for the hovered component
chatbox.debug.tip4: ②Left-click and drag to move components
chatbox.debug.tip5: ③Mouse wheel scroll to adjust %s (hold alt to change property)
chatbox.debug.tip6: %s + C to copy current hovered component information
